title: Kalamassery Mahaganapathy Temple
tagline: Kalamassery Mahaganapathy Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Kalamassery Mahaganapathy Temple (Malayalam: കളമശ്ശേരി മഹാഗണപതി ക്ഷേത്രം) is a Hindu temple in North Kalamassery dedicated to Ganapathy (Ganesha).
overview.description: Kalamassery Mahaganapathy Temple (Malayalam: കളമശ്ശേരി മഹാഗണപതി ക്ഷേത്രം) is a Hindu temple in North Kalamassery dedicated to Ganapathy (Ganesha).

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Kalamassery metro station
topPlaces.description: Kalamassery is a station of Kochi Metro. The station is located between Muttom and Cochin University, in the municipality of Kalamassery.

topPlaces.name: St. Thomas Church, Kalamassery
topPlaces.description: St. Thomas Marthoma Church Kalamassery, is a prominent Christian parish of the Kottayam – Kochi diocese under the Malankara Mar Thoma Syrian Church of Malabar.

topPlaces.name: Rajagiri
topPlaces.description: Rajagiri is a part of the Carmelites of Mary Immaculate (CMI), an indigenous Syrian Catholic religious congregation founded in 1831. It is located in Rajagiri Valley, Kakkanad, Kochi.

topPlaces.name: Kalamassery
topPlaces.description: Kalamassery ([kɐɭɐmɐʃːeːɾi]) is a major industrial region in the city of Kochi in the state of Kerala, India. It is located around 9 km (5.6 mi) northeast of the city centre.

topPlaces.name: Muttom metro station
topPlaces.description: Muttom is a station of Kochi Metro. The station is located between Ambattukavu and Kalamassery.

topPlaces.name: St. Joseph's of the Woods EMHS
topPlaces.description: St. Joseph's of the Woods English-Medium Higher Secondary School is a Catholic Co-Educational higher secondary school in Thrikkakkara (Kalamassery), Kochi in the Indian state of Kerala.

image.alt: St. Joseph's of the Woods EMHS

topPlaces.name: Our Lady of Immaculate Conception Church, Manjummel
topPlaces.description: Our Lady of Immaculate Conception Church, popularly known as Manjummel Palli, is a Catholic parish church coming under the Archdiocese of Verapoly. It is situated along the Eloor - Muttar Road, about 8 km from Kalamassery at Manjummel, in Kochi, Kerala.

image.alt: Our Lady of Immaculate Conception Church, Manjummel

topPlaces.name: BSES Kerala Power Limited
topPlaces.description: BSES Kerala Power Limited is an independent power producer incorporated on 4 April 1996. It was established as a joint-venture by Bombay Suburban Electricity Supply (BSES) and Kerala State Industrial Development Corporation Ltd (KSIDC).

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kalamassery Mahaganapathy Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kalamassery Mahaganapathy Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Kalamassery Mahaganapathy Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (13 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (11 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kalamassery Mahaganapathy Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kalamassery Mahaganapathy Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kalamassery Mahaganapathy Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Kalamassery Mahaganapathy Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kalamassery Mahaganapathy Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kalamassery metro station, St. Thomas Church, Kalamassery, Rajagiri, Kalamassery, Muttom metro station.
